summary: Tested all new features: profile page, change password, forgot/reset password. Fixed critical auth race condition in ProfilePage.js (redirected to login before auth resolved). All 14 backend tests pass. All UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: ProfilePage.js had auth race condition: used `if (!user) navigate('/login')` without checking `loading` state. When auth is still resolving (user=null, loading=true), the page immediately redirected to login. FIXED: Now checks `if (authLoading) return;` before the auth guard.
test_credentials: admin@gimudigital.com / admin123, test@example.com / test123 (registered during testing)
seed_data_creation: Registered test@example.com (test123) as it was missing from DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All profile/password features work. Auth uses httpOnly cookies with withCredentials:true. ProfilePage loading race condition was fixed in this iteration. Test user test@example.com/test123 now exists in DB.
rca_of_issue: ProfilePage.js was checking `if (!user) navigate('/login')` using only the user state (initially null). On page load, AuthContext.checkAuth() is async - user starts as null before resolving. So direct navigation to /profile would always redirect to login before auth resolved. Fix: destructure `loading` from useAuth, check `if (authLoading) return` before the auth guard.
